items.title: Davis Global Fund 2025 Semi-Annual Review
items.description: Davis Global Fund posted a strong return of +14.12% in the first six months of 2025, outperforming its MSCI ACWI (All Country World Index) benchmark. Read more here.

items.title: Davis International Fund 2025 Semi-Annual Review
items.description: Davis International Fund posted a strong return of +16.32% in the first six months of 2025, though this was below the performance of the MSCI ACWI (All Country World Index) ex US benchmark.

items.title: Consumer Tech News (August 11–August 15): Consumer Sentiment Slips, Stimulus Sparks Rallies, and Cisco & Applied Materials Headline Earnings
items.description: Consumer Tech News (Aug 11–15): Earnings season winds down as sentiment slips, China stimulus lifts markets, and Cisco & Applied Materials shine amid volatile macro conditions.

items.title: ADX: Discount Narrows Further, Likely Limiting Outsized Gains Moving Forward
items.description: ADX's performance outpaced S&P 500 in share price returns, but future upside due to discount contraction is likely to be limited. Read more on ADX here.
